text:
(In reply to p5B2E9A8F from comment #0)
Edit:
After running Poudriere bulk builds with no python related in Poudriere's /etc/make.conf python35 is deinstalled and no python36 is installed when doing pkg upgrade on clients, causing broken systems with python3 N/A.
